direct_aggregate_object_intermediate.comments: Regression test for the HLL->Long ClassCastException. When a no-group-by aggregate is colocated on a single server, the v2 physical optimizer produces an AGGREGATE_DIRECT leaf that returns final results (SERVER_RETURN_FINAL_RESULT). Aggregations whose intermediate type differs from their final type (e.g. DISTINCTCOUNTHLLPLUS -> HyperLogLogPlus/LONG, DISTINCTCOUNT -> Set/INT) must be finalized before the leaf serializes its output. A 'replicated' table forces single-server colocation -> AGGREGATE_DIRECT. NOTE: the DISTINCTCOUNT* assertions use exact equality, which is only safe because the distinct cardinality here is tiny (2-3 values) where HLL is exact; do not raise the cardinality.

queries.description: SUM + DISTINCTCOUNTHLLPLUS FILTER (the reported failing shape)
queries.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS s, DISTINCTCOUNTHLLPLUS(user_id) FILTER (WHERE user_id <> '') AS dc FROM {tbl}
queries.h2Sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS s, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN user_id <> '' THEN user_id END) AS dc FROM {tbl}

queries.description: Plain DISTINCTCOUNTHLLPLUS (no filter) still hits the same DIRECT path
queries.h2Sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS dc FROM {tbl}

queries.description: DISTINCTCOUNT (Set intermediate, INT final) - same finalize requirement
queries.h2Sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS dc FROM {tbl}

queries.description: Primitive-only DIRECT aggregate (intermediate type == final type) - finalize loop must be a correct no-op
queries.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS s, COUNT(*) AS c FROM {tbl}
queries.h2Sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS s, COUNT(*) AS c FROM {tbl}

direct_aggregate_object_intermediate_nul.comments: Same DIRECT path with column-based null handling enabled and FILTERs that match zero rows, so the finalized value is NULL (SUM) / 0 (COUNT-family). Exercises the null finalization path of getRows() in SERVER_RETURN_FINAL_RESULT mode.

queries.description: Zero-match FILTERs: SUM finalizes to NULL, DISTINCTCOUNTHLLPLUS/COUNT finalize to 0
queries.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE amount > 1000) AS s, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE amount > 1000) AS c, DISTINCTCOUNTHLLPLUS(user_id) FILTER (WHERE amount > 1000) AS dc FROM {tbl}
queries.h2Sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN amount > 1000 THEN amount END) AS s, COUNT(CASE WHEN amount > 1000 THEN 1 END) AS c, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN amount > 1000 THEN user_id END) AS dc FROM {tbl}
